description: Status information about a live broadcast including its privacy status and lifecycle status.
name: LiveBroadcastStatus

lifeCycleStatus.description: The broadcast's status as it relates to the lifecycle of the broadcast.

madeForKids.description: Indicates whether the broadcast is designated as child-directed.

selfDeclaredMadeForKids.description: Indicates whether the channel owner has designated the broadcast as being made for kids.
